{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-7cx3-2qx2-3g6w. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
phpMyFAQ before 4.1.2 contains a missing authorization vulnerability in the DELETE /admin/api/content/tags/{tagId} endpoint that allows any authenticated user to delete tags. Any logged-in user, including regular frontend users, can delete arbitrary tags by sending a DELETE request with a valid session cookie, resulting in permanent data loss and disruption of FAQ organization.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5h62-f8fg-4w7q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T21:17:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5h62-f8fg-4w7q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5h62-f8fg-4w7q"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T19:17:03Z", "published_at": "2026-05-15T21:31:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/thorsten/phpMyFAQ/security/advisories/GHSA-7cx3-2qx2-3g6w", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46365", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/phpmyfaq-missing-authorization-in-tag-deletion-endpoint", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5h62-f8fg-4w7q"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/thorsten/phpMyFAQ", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: phpMyFAQ: Missing Authorization on Tag Deletion Allows Any Authenticated User to Delete Tags", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T00:05:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5h62-f8fg-4w7q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "phpMyFAQ/phpMyFAQ"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.1.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "thorsten/phpMyFAQ"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.1.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-09T00:05:36Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: phpMyFAQ: Missing Authorization on Tag Deletion Allows Any Authenticated User to Delete Tags
